name: Uinta Bank
message: Established in 1919, Uinta Bank is a community bank headquartered in Mountain View, Wyoming. Uinta Bank is proud to provide community banking to the individuals, families and businesses located in Uinta County, the Bridger Valley, and neighboring communities. Personal service has been a legacy passed from generation to generation in the communities Uinta Bank serves. As a community member, we continue to serve in civic leadership and philanthropic capacities. As a community bank, we continue to provide financial services in a manner consistent with the demands of our customers. To remain competitive, Uinta Bank has adapted to the changing needs of customers as well as the changing nature of the banking industry. However, as we change and grow, we continue to place emphasis on the following: Uinta Bank offers a wide range of products and services to meet the needs of the communities we serve. High-quality, personal customer service is offered at all levels of the organization
